prestazioni: Engine: Replace the stock 1VD-FTV (4.5L V8 turbo-diesel) with a fully built internals package featuring forged Mahle pistons (9.5:1 compression), Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft from Manley Performance. Pair with a Garrett GTX5533R turbocharger (1.06 A/R turbine housing) and a custom 4-inch stainless steel exhaust system by Tomei, featuring a 304-grade downpipe and a straight-pipe design with a Borla Pro XS muffler for optimized backpressure.

Fuel System: Upgrade to a dual Bosch CP4.2 high-pressure fuel pump setup with 1000cc ID1700x injectors from Injector Dynamics, controlled via an AEM 2000 Infinity ECU with a custom Dakar-spec tune by Unichip Africa, optimized for high-altitude performance and sand ingestion resistance. Add a secondary fuel rail with Aeromotive A1000 fuel pumps and a Radium Engineering surge tank for consistent fuel delivery during extreme articulation.

Suspension & Drivetrain: Install a full Öhlins TTX46 coilover system with 3-way adjustable damping (compression, rebound, and high-speed compression) and 300mm of travel, paired with custom Dakar-spec springs (14kg/mm front, 16kg/mm rear) from Eibach. Replace the stock differentials with ARB RD120 front and rear locking differentials, and upgrade the transfer case with a Quaife ATB helical LSD. Reinforce the chassis with a custom roll cage by Safety Devices, designed to FIA Dakar regulations, and add a set of Hutchinson beadlock wheels (17x9 front, 17x10 rear) with BF Goodrich KM3 tires (37x12.5R17).
estetica: Aero & Body: Install a Dakar-spec widebody kit by Liberty Walk, modified to fit the Land Cruiser’s frame with custom carbon fiber fender flares (3.5-inch wider front, 4-inch wider rear) and a vented hood with a NACA duct for turbo cooling. Add a custom front bumper by Rally Art, featuring a winch mount for a Warn Zeon 12-S Platinum and integrated LED light pods (Baja Designs Squadron Pro). Replace the rear bumper with a tubular steel design by 4Wheel Parts, incorporating a spare tire carrier and a swing-out dual jerry can holder.

Lighting & Electronics: Upgrade to a full LED lighting system by Rigid Industries, including a 50-inch E-Series Pro LED light bar mounted on a custom roof rack by Front Runner Outfitters, and auxiliary D-Series SAE-compliant pods on the A-pillars. Add a custom wiring harness by Painless Performance for auxiliary switches and a dual-battery system (Optima YellowTop) with a National Luna DC-DC charger. Install a Garmin Overlander GPS with a 10-inch touchscreen and a rearview camera system by Pioneer.

Interior & Details: Replace the stock interior with a full custom setup by Sparco, featuring Dakar-spec seats (Sparco Pro 2000) with 6-point harnesses by Schroth, a custom aluminum dashboard with a Racepak IQ3 data logger, and a MOMO Dakar steering wheel. Add a full sound deadening treatment by Dynamat Extreme and a custom roll cage padding by Impact Race Products. For exterior details, wrap the body in a matte military green vinyl by 3M, with custom Dakar rally decals by DecalFX and a carbon fiber roof by Seibon.
